metadata.name: Abbie's Blasting Love (The Crazy Kaleidoscope Remix)
metadata.author: Se7enSlasher + martin + Geiss + Claude AI + DeepSeek + serge000 + Rovastar + Krash
metadata.source: Se7enSlasher + martin + Geiss + Claude AI + DeepSeek + serge000 + Rovastar + Krash - Abbie's Blasting Love (The Crazy Kaleidoscope Remix).milk

perFrameCode: //If you need a good BPM detection, why don't you simply use my code ? - Nitorami
//Credits in comp shader code. Don't blame me.
tcorr = (dt - dt_); //to compensate timing errors caused by MD's time smoothing
treal += dt + tcorr*38; //I-share of timing error comp.
exc=2*bass+mid+treb;  //choose what you like but mind this could affect quali
arg = treal*w + tcorr*15000; //P-share of timing error comp.
//Se7enSlasher - Convert BPM to integer and do a simple rounding.
//Se7enSlasher - Change the intBPM value to 0 when there is no sound.
q11=(2*abs((sin(time)-0.5))-cool_krash_rotation_movement); //Used for remix, I think it's not needed, anyways.
